---
title: "Soil Profile Sketches"
author: "D.E. Beaudette"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
fig-format: svg
out-width: 100%
fig-column: page-right
code-overflow: wrap
code-block-bg: "#F7F7F7"
fig-align: "center"
fontsize: 10pt

execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false

format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---
  
```{r}
#| label = "setup",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| results = "hide",
#| warning = FALSE
library(knitr, quietly=TRUE)


opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE, 
  background = '#F7F7F7', 
  fig.align = 'center', 
  dev = 'png', 
  tidy = FALSE, 
  verbose = FALSE
)

options(width = 100)
```
